LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Khan_Chemists.description: The Great Khans have perfected the art of chem production. Their chemists are revered members of the tribe, responsible for creating the drugs that fund the Khan's operations. A skilled chem maker is worth their weight in silver, and their knowledge is passed down through generations.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Khan_Chemists.label: Khan Chemists
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Khan_Freedom.description: The Great Khans reject the chains of "civilized" society - no laws, no taxes, no rulers except the strongest among them. They value personal freedom above all else, but with that freedom comes responsibility to the tribe. Strength is respected, weakness is despised, and loyalty to your brothers and sisters is sacred. The Khans don't apologize for taking what they need - the wasteland belongs to those strong enough to claim it.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Khan_Freedom.label: Khan Freedom
